channel.title: virtualbox on My New Hugo Site
channel.description: Recent content in virtualbox on My New Hugo Site

item.title: How to extend the Ubuntu guest OS's hard disk for VirtualBox on Mac
item.description: How to extend the Ubuntu guest OS’s hard disk for VirtualBox on Mac Steps: resize the VDI file on Mac OS: How to Resize a VirtualBox VDI or VHD File on Mac OS X boot the Ubuntu with the image(ISO) and Gparted(resize the partition). Note: firstly resize the extension partition (/dev/sda2), then resize the partition (/dev/sda5) Ubuntu VM in VirtualBox: How to increase the size of a disk and make small(er) exports for distribution
